creator: adrian@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

Please migrate these bugs to the wireless category via whatever bulk
update method you use to not trigger mass emails. :)

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?bug_status=__all__&content=freebsd-wireless&list_id=2689&order=relevance%20desc&product=Base%20System&query_format=specific

I'll see about grabbing any other bugs that match net80211, ath, etc., once this is done.

Thanks!


-a
